title: 珠玉へのディスタンス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our trial against Mejiro McQueen begins. These 2,400 meters of turf
will determine whether I'm fit to be Satono Diamond's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(She's kept up so far, but it's still early. 2,400 meters is a
considerable distance—the true test is yet to come.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(We're almost at the final stretch! Soon, the true contest will
be...gin?!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Huh? A final spurt already?! She broke ahead of me!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
An impressive burst of speed. But!
Haaaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(Oh my... your inexperience is showing. That momentum of yours
won't last! This match is settled, Satono!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Nnnghaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen blitzes past Satono Diamond, and from then on, the
gap only widens—all the way until the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Satono... may I ask what your intentions were? Why choose such a
losing strategy?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(She's... not looking at me. It's like she can't even hear my voice.
And...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(There isn't a hint of regret in her eyes. She looks satisfied... like she
gave it her all.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: (Ah. I believe I understand.)

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Very well, let's move on to the verdict. There was a significant gap
toward the end of the race... but please give us your opinion,
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Before I announce my decision, there is something I wish to confirm
first. Satono...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You weren't aiming to win today, were you? I suspect you didn't do
any 2,400-meter training either.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text: Not aiming to win? No training? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's reputation isn't for nothing. She's seen through
everything, just from Satono Diamond's running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: May I ask you two to explain?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Of course. You see, we...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Reduce my training? And to top it off, we're not prioritizing the
trial? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: If we don't pass, my family won't give us their approval! We have to—
choice_data_list: Achieving your dream is more important.
Achieving your dream is more important.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's dream is to win a G1 race. Given her current
physique, it's too dangerous to train her for 2,400 meters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her first races will be at the junior level, and the longest junior G1 is
2,000 meters. I can't ignore that to focus on this trial—not if I call
myself a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Are you... saying I shouldn't even try? Because I might injure myself?
But I...
choice_data_list: Don't lose sight of your true goal!
Don't lose sight of your true goal!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Our number one goal... is achieving our dream. Not passing today's
trial.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So we only trained the qualities I need right now. Even if you might
not like it...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is the path I must take. I'll make our dream—our family's dearest
wish—come true. Trainer and I were brought together for this
purpose.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A 2,000-meter G1 demands speed. I may not have the all-around
ability to win at 2,400 meters yet, but this speed will be key in all my
future G1s.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is what we wanted to show you. We've charted a course towards
our dream—one that doesn't take unnecessary risks. Today, you saw
how far we've come!

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text: Dia... You...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. That certainly explains it. I had thought your final spurt was too
hasty, but you were treating it like a 2,000-meter finish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Then there was the look in your eyes when you lost. It reminded me of
my past self.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. When I took part in the Classics, everyone competed with
burning passion. You could tell each of us was chasing far-fetched
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Others desperately chased the Triple Crown. But as a member of the
Mejiro family, I had a different priority—the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Our racing careers are as fleeting as youth itself, yet there are still
those who choose to devote their careers to their chosen path... That
same resolve made me who I am today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Only those who chase their dreams with wholehearted dedication may
achieve them, even if they must abandon all else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen smiles at us like an affectionate mother.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text: I see... Yes, I see... My goodness, it... it all makes sense now...

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we haven't been dedicated enough to our dream. We haven't
won a G1 race because we've been too focused on fundamentals and
reputation.

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
In that case, we need to change. My daughter has broken jinxes all
her life. If her instincts tell her this is right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's parents look at each other. They nod slowly, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. From now on, we entrust Dia to you. She is our family's most
brilliant gem...

text_block_list.name: Dia's Father
text_block_list.text:
...And our beloved daughter. We shall have faith in you as you have
in each other.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! We did it, Trainer! We really did it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's make our dream come true! Nobody's ever broken my family's
jinx, but I know we can, as long as we work together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've managed to pass the Satono family's trial and gain their
approval. But this is only the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're still a long way from achieving Satono Diamond's dream—our dream. But one day, she'll win a G1 race and shine at the top of the racing world.
